chunks.title: Fall of Babylonian Idols
chunks.reason: Describes the defeat and captivity of Bel and Nebo.

chunks.title: God's Promise to Carry Israel
chunks.reason: Direct address from God promising to bear His people through old age.

chunks.title: Contrast Between Idols and God
chunks.reason: Rhetorical question comparing the static idols to the living God.

chunks.title: God's Sovereignty Over History
chunks.reason: Declaration of God's unique power to declare the end from the beginning.

chunks.title: Call to Repentance and Promise of Salvation
chunks.reason: Final call to the stubborn heart with a promise of near salvation.
